description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a low-pitched, dark gable roof. The exterior features a mix of light gray and white walls, with large windows distributed across the facades, providing ample natural light. A small porch area is visible at the front, accompanied by a driveway and a garage on one side. The property is surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs, adding greenery and privacy to the setting. The roofline is clean and simple, with minimal overhangs and no visible chimneys. The overall design emphasizes functionality and a contemporary aesthetic, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, large windows, and a small front porch, surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, garage, and a symmetrical arrangement of trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a cluster of trees on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear windows, and a more private garden area with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the side entrance, garage, and a denser arrangement of trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
